SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.County = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      s.School,      f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" FROM      frpm f JOIN      schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE      s.SchoolType = 'Continuation' ORDER BY      f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" ASC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Zip  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'Fresno' AND Charter = 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.MailStreet FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode ORDER BY f.FRPM_Count (K-12) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE Charter = 1 AND OpenDate > '2000-01-01'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE satscores.AvgScrMath > 400 AND schools.Virtual = 'Yes'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DISTINCT s.School FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE ss.NumTstTakr > 500 AND (s.Magnet = 1 OR s.GSoffered LIKE '%Magnet%')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE ss.NumGE1500 > 0 ORDER BY ss.NumGE1500 DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NumTstTakr  FROM satscores  WHERE cds = (     SELECT CDSCode      FROM frpm      ORDER BY "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode)  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE ss.AvgScrMath > 560 AND s.FundingType = 'Charter'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT frpm."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" FROM satscores AS sat JOIN frpm ON sat.cds = frpm.CDSCode ORDER BY sat.AvgScrRead DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT cds  FROM satscores  GROUP BY cds  HAVING SUM(enroll12) > 500	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS HighestEligibleFreeRate FROM frpm f JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds WHERE CAST(s.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / s.enroll12 > 0.3	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.Phone FROM schools s JOIN (     SELECT cds, AVG(AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite) AS avg_excellence_rate     FROM satscores     GROUP BY cds     ORDER BY avg_excellence_rate DESC     LIMIT 3 ) ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.NCESSchool FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode ORDER BY f.Enrollment (Ages 5-17) DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.District, MAX(ss.AvgScrRead) FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE s.StatusType = 'Active' GROUP BY s.District ORDER BY AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.County = 'Alameda' AND satscores.NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.CharterNum, s.School, ss.AvgScrWrite FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499 ORDER BY ss.AvgScrWrite DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode  JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds  WHERE frpm.County Name = 'Fresno'    AND frpm.FundingType = 'Directly Funded'    AND satscores.NumTstTakr <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds ORDER BY ss.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.County = 'Amador' AND frpm.LowGrade = '9' AND frpm.HighGrade = '12'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.County = 'Los Angeles'  AND frpm.FreeMealCount (K-12) > 500  AND frpm.FRPM Count (K-12) < 700	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, MAX(ss.NumTstTakr) AS MaxTestTakers FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE s.County = 'Contra Costa' GROUP BY s.School ORDER BY MaxTestTakers DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.Street, s.City, s.State, s.Zip FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE ABS(f.Enrollment (K-12) - f.Enrollment (Ages 5-17)) > 30	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School FROM frpm f JOIN satscores ss ON f.CDSCode = ss.cds JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" > 0.1 AND ss.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.FundingType FROM schools s JOIN (     SELECT cds, AVG(AvgScrMath) AS avg_math_score     FROM satscores     GROUP BY cds     HAVING AVG(AvgScrMath) > 400 ) ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE s.County = 'Riverside'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      s.School AS SchoolName,     s.Street || ', ' || s.City || ', ' || s.State || ' ' || s.Zip AS FullAddress FROM      frpm f JOIN      schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE      s.County = 'Monterey' AND     f.FreeMealCount (Ages 5-17) > 800	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, ss.AvgScrWrite, s.CharterNum FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE (s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') ORDER BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools

WITH EnrollmentDifference AS (     SELECT          s.School,         s.DOCType,         f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS Difference     FROM          schools s     JOIN          frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode     WHERE          s.FundingType = 'Locally Funded' ), AverageDifference AS (     SELECT          AVG(Difference) AS AvgDiff     FROM          EnrollmentDifference ) SELECT      School,     DOCType FROM      EnrollmentDifference, AverageDifference WHERE      Difference > AvgDiff	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT OpenDate  FROM schools  WHERE CDSCode IN (     SELECT CDSCode      FROM frpm      ORDER BY Enrollment (K-12) DESC      LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.City, MIN(f."Enrollment (K-12)") AS Enrollment FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode GROUP BY s.City ORDER BY Enrollment ASC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" FROM frpm ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 9, 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      School Name,      Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) AS EligibleFreeRate FROM      frpm WHERE      CDSCode IN (         SELECT              CDSCode         FROM              schools         WHERE              DOC = 66         ORDER BY              Free Meal Count (K-12) DESC         LIMIT 5     ) ORDER BY      EligibleFreeRate DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website, s.School FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f.FreeMealCount (Ages 5-17) BETWEEN 1900 AND 2000	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Kacey' AND AdmLName1 = 'Gibson'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1  FROM schools  WHERE Charter = 1  ORDER BY (SELECT Enrollment FROM frpm WHERE CDSCode = schools.CDSCode ORDER BY Enrollment ASC LIMIT 1) ASC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmFName1, AdmLName1, AdmFName2, AdmLName2, AdmFName3, AdmLName3 FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = (     SELECT cds     FROM satscores     ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC     LIMIT 1 )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State FROM schools s JOIN (     SELECT cds, MIN(AvgScrRead + AvgScrMath + AvgScrWrite) AS total_score     FROM satscores     GROUP BY cds ) ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds ORDER BY ss.total_score ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Website FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles' AND ss.NumTstTakr BETWEEN 2000 AND 3000	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AVG(satscores.NumTstTakr)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.County = 'Fresno'  AND schools.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f.County Name = 'Fresno' ORDER BY f.AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

WITH VirtualSchools AS (     SELECT          s.School,         s.County,         ss.AvgScrRead     FROM          schools s     JOIN          satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds     WHERE          s.Virtual = 'Yes' ), RankedSchools AS (     SELECT          School,         County,         AvgScrRead,         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY AvgScrRead DESC) as rank     FROM          VirtualSchools ) SELECT      School,     County,     AvgScrRead FROM      RankedSchools WHERE      rank <= 5	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, f.Educational_Option_Type FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE f.AvgScrMath = (     SELECT MAX(AvgScrMath)     FROM frpm )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.AvgScrMath, s.County FROM satscores s JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode ORDER BY (s.AvgScrRead + s.AvgScrMath + s.AvgScrWrite) / 3 ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.AvgScrWrite, sch.City FROM satscores s JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode WHERE s.NumGE1500 >= 1500 ORDER BY s.NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich' GROUP BY s.School	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, MAX(f.Enrollment (K-12)) AS MaxEnrollment FROM schools s JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE s.SpecialSchool = 'Y' ORDER BY MaxEnrollment DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT strftime('%m', OpenDate) AS Month, COUNT(*) AS AvgSchoolsOpened FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda' AND District = 'Elementary School District' AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980' GROUP BY Month	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.District Type = 'Unified School District' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /     SUM(CASE WHEN T1.District Type = 'Elementary School District' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio FROM      frpm AS T1 JOIN      schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE      T2.County = 'Orange'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT County, School, ClosedDate FROM schools WHERE StatusType = 'Closed' GROUP BY County, School, ClosedDate ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.Street FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds ORDER BY ss.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 6, 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.MailStreet, s.School FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode)  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE ss.NumGE1500 >= 1500 AND s.MailCity = 'Lakeport'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(enroll12)  FROM satscores  JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.MailCity = 'Fresno'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, MailZip  FROM schools  WHERE AdmFName1 = 'Avetik' AND AdmLName1 = 'Atoian'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Colusa' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /      SUM(CASE WHEN County = 'Humboldt' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio FROM      schools WHERE      MailState = 'CA'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE MailState = 'CA' AND City = 'San Joaquin' AND StatusType = 'Active'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone, s.Ext  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  ORDER BY ss.AvgScrWrite DESC  LIMIT 332, 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone, Ext, School  FROM schools  WHERE Zip = '95203-3704'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT Website  FROM schools  WHERE (AdmFName1 = 'Mike' AND AdmLName1 = 'Larson') OR (AdmFName2 = 'Mike' AND AdmLName2 = 'Larson') OR (AdmFName3 = 'Mike' AND AdmLName3 = 'Larson')    OR (AdmFName1 = 'Dante' AND AdmLName1 = 'Alvarez') OR (AdmFName2 = 'Dante' AND AdmLName2 = 'Alvarez') OR (AdmFName3 = 'Dante' AND AdmLName3 = 'Alvarez')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Website  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'San Joaquin' AND Charter = 1 AND Virtual = 'Partially'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.City = 'Hickman'  AND frpm.Charter School (Y/N) = 1  AND frpm.District Name = 'Elementary School District'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM frpm  JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode  WHERE schools.County = 'Los Angeles'  AND schools.Charter = 0  AND frpm."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" < 0.18	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      s.School AS SchoolName,     s.City AS City,     s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1 AS Administrator1,     s.AdmFName2 || ' ' || s.AdmLName2 AS Administrator2,     s.AdmFName3 || ' ' || s.AdmLName3 AS Administrator3 FROM      schools s WHERE      s.Charter = 1 AND s.CharterNum = '00D2'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE MailCity = 'Hickman' AND CharterNum = '00D4'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN FundingType = 'Locally Funded' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS LocallyFundedRatio FROM      schools WHERE      County = 'Santa Clara'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*)  FROM schools  WHERE County = 'Stanislaus'  AND FundingType = 'Directly Funded'  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2005-12-31'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalClosures FROM schools WHERE City = 'San Francisco' AND ClosedDate BETWEEN '1989-01-01' AND '1989-12-31'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS ClosureCount FROM schools WHERE ClosedDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1989-12-31'   AND StatusType = 'Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)' GROUP BY County ORDER BY ClosureCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT NCESDist  FROM schools  WHERE SOCType = 'State Special Schools'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) AS ActiveClosedCount FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alpine' AND School LIKE '%District Community Day School%' AND (StatusType = 'Active' OR StatusType = 'Closed')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DistrictCode  FROM frpm  WHERE CDSCode NOT IN (     SELECT CDSCode      FROM schools      WHERE Magnet = 1 AND City = 'Fresno' )	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT SUM("Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS Total_Students FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.School = 'State Special School' AND schools.City = 'Fremont' AND frpm."Academic Year" = '2014-2015'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.School = 'Youth Authority School' AND schools.MailStreet = 'PO Box 1040'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT MIN(Low Grade)  FROM frpm  WHERE District Name = 'District Special Education Consortia' AND NCESSchool = '0613360'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, f.Educational Option Type  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f.NSLP Provision Status = 'Breakfast Provision 2' AND f.County Code = '37'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f.NSLP Provision Status = 'Lunch Provision 2'  AND f.Low Grade = '9'  AND f.High Grade = '12'  AND f.County Name = 'Merced'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, f."Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f.County Name = 'Los Angeles' AND f.Low Grade = 'K' AND f.High Grade = '9'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSserved, COUNT(*) as count  FROM schools  WHERE City = 'Adelanto'  GROUP BY GSserved  ORDER BY count DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS SchoolCount FROM schools WHERE County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara') AND Virtual = 'Yes' GROUP BY County ORDER BY SchoolCount DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT School, Latitude, SchoolType  FROM schools  WHERE Latitude = (SELECT MAX(Latitude) FROM schools)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.City, f.LowestGrade, s.School FROM schools s JOIN (     SELECT CDSCode, MIN(Latitude) AS LowestLatitude     FROM schools     WHERE State = 'California'     GROUP BY CDSCode ) subq ON s.CDSCode = subq.CDSCode JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE s.State = 'California' AND s.Latitude = subq.LowestLatitude	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT GSoffered  FROM schools  WHERE Longitude = (SELECT MAX(Longitude) FROM schools)	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      s.City,     COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode) AS SchoolCount,     COUNT(DISTINCT f.EducationalOptionType) AS MultipleProvisionTypes FROM      schools s JOIN      frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE      s.Magnet = 1 AND     f.LowGrade = 'K' AND     f.HighGrade = '8' GROUP BY      s.City	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT AdmFName1, District, COUNT(*) AS NameCount FROM schools GROUP BY AdmFName1, District ORDER BY NameCount DESC LIMIT 2	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT frpm."Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)", frpm."District Code" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT      AdmLName1 AS AdministratorLastName,     District AS SchoolDistrict,     County AS SchoolCounty,     School AS SchoolName FROM      schools WHERE      CharterNum = '40'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3 FROM schools WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'   AND City = 'San Bernardino'   AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'   AND CDSCode IN (     SELECT CDSCode     FROM frpm     WHERE School Type IN ('Public Intermediate/Middle School', 'Unified School')   )	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.School, s.AdmEmail1 FROM schools s JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE ss.NumGE1500 > 0 ORDER BY ss.NumTstTakr DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
